Appearance

KC-XW-37BLEA documentation on XW-37 BLE

Get Started
📖

Overview

Introduction to the XW37-BLE low-power Bluetooth 5.2 module, including key specifications, features, and applications.

🔌

Hardware

Pinout definitions and package dimensions for the 18mm × 12mm × 1.7mm compact module with 26 interface pins.

📡

BLE Stack

Bluetooth operating modes and UUID configuration for seamless BLE communication with the module.

⌨️

AT Commands

Complete AT command reference for configuring the module's working modes and parameters.

🔄

UART Communication

UART work modes and special pin functions for MCU communication and status indication.

📊

API Reference

Power consumption specifications and reflow profile guidelines for manufacturing integration.
